news.t: Franklin Templeton Expands Active ETF Lineup with Two New International Equity Strategies

holdings.infoBox: PGRI is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 8.08%, ASML Holding at 7.55%, AstraZeneca at 5.13%, HOYA Corporation at 5.02%, and Safran at 4.60%.

overview.description: The Putnam International Stock ETF (PGRI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in international large- and mid-cap companies. Investments involve both developed and emerging markets, focusing on companies with solid advantages, good management, large market share, and growth potential. PGRI was launched on Oct 20, 2025 and is issued by Putnam.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Expands Active ETF Lineup with Two New International Equity Strategies
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton today announced the launch of two new actively managed international equity ETFs designed to provide investors with distinct approaches to access...
